meaning: n.土耳其语,土耳其语系者adj.土耳其语系的
examples: Armenian and Turkic are spoken among the small Armenian and Turkoman populations.
The name of the currency is related with the Russian word for money which was borrowed from Turkic.
The nation"s largest ethnic group is the Kyrgyz, a Turkic group with Mongolian and Chinese influences.
In Central Asia, the Turkic nomads met up with the Muslim and Persian world.
Tajiks speak Persian, whereas Azeris, Turkmen, Uzbeks and Kazakhs speak Turkic languages.
